properties.name: Katra (Base Camp)
properties.description: Starting point of the Vaishno Devi pilgrimage. Registration and base camp facilities available.

properties.name: Banganga
properties.description: First major stop. Holy river where pilgrims take a ritual bath. Temple and refreshment facilities available.

properties.name: Charan Paduka
properties.description: Sacred rock with footprints of Mata Vaishno Devi. Beautiful viewpoint with refreshment stalls.

properties.name: Ardhkuwari
properties.description: Halfway point with cave temple. Important religious site where Mata meditated for 9 months. Accommodation and food available.

properties.name: Himkoti
properties.description: Scenic point with panoramic mountain views. Refreshment facilities and rest area.

properties.name: Sanjichhat
properties.description: Highest point of the trek. Helicopter service point. Medical facilities and refreshments available.

properties.name: Bhawan (Holy Cave)
properties.description: Main shrine of Mata Vaishno Devi. Holy cave with three natural rock formations (Pindies). Darshan and prasad facilities.

properties.name: Bhairon Temple
properties.description: Optional trek from Bhawan. Pilgrimage considered incomplete without visiting Bhairon Baba. Ropeway available.
